title: Pumpkin Survival House
description: Adds a Pumpkin Survival House, a small and cozy starter home built inside a giant pumpkin
body:
This mod adds a Pumpkin Survival House to the game a small and cozy starter home built inside a giant pumpkin. 

It’s perfect for the early game, giving you a safe place to spend your first nights away from monsters.


![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4971f6b5fc5cf22480e518a7c440fa59035083b3.jpeg)

Inside, you’ll find some simple loot, helping you at the start off the game.
The interior is fully decorated with a cozy pumpkin theme.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1d7e9e9a3570e683a8010b4b0c85e009be4b64.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d50400b15a951d4007bdf6f6d2976db390a44472.jpeg)

The Pumpkin Survival House generates in Meadow, Forest, and Taiga biomes.

**Feel free to put it in your modpack!**
